payload.answer: The system will store a single, punctuation-preserving memory_card representing the full 8000-word transcript as provided, without deleting or superseding any content. Ambiguities in the transcript are preserved as part of the memory, and no re-interpretation is applied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a single 8000-word transcript; no downstream disambiguation performed to avoid information loss; preserve original entities and their relations.

memory_cards.statement: One conversation summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript preserved with punctuation and formatting intent to reflect original transcript as-is, without condensation or rephrasing, and with ambiguity preserved where the transcript contains ambiguous statements or multiple interpretations.

details: Memory card created: conversation_summary with punctuation-preserving transcription.
Ambiguities retained; no reprocessing of content to clarify ambiguous statements.
